objective: Send an InternalMeshFrame ping from gateway to broker and back. trace_id propagates across the wire.
in_scope: Define InternalMeshFrame struct in crates/rafka-mesh-ops (org_id mandatory in for_op constructor)
Gateway sends a Ping frame every 10s after a broker peer is connected
Broker echoes back a Pong frame
Both sides emit rafka.mesh.frame.sent / rafka.mesh.frame.received with the same trace_id
exit_criteria: Jaeger shows a single trace spanning both services: gateway frame.sent → broker frame.received → broker frame.sent (pong) → gateway frame.received
trace_id is identical across all 4 spans (trace propagation works)
Jaeger URL pre-filtered to a representative ping-pong trace
